Valiant (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,478,106Details
International Box Office $44,710,281
Worldwide Box Office $64,188,387
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,914,722 (30.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.29 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:30.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,014 opening theaters/2,016 max. theaters, 5.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $36,342,924

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 19th, 2005 (Wide) by Walt Disney
